creator: hrkfdn@gmail.com
text:
Umm yeah .. another fix, screw the first one. Update to 0.3.3.1

--- echinus.diff begins here ---
diff -Naur ./Makefile ../echinus/Makefile
--- ./Makefile	2009-05-07 23:07:22.000000000 +0200
+++ ../echinus/Makefile	2009-05-07 23:07:27.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	echinus
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.2.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.3.1
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://rootshell.be/~polachok/code/

diff -Naur ./distinfo ../echinus/distinfo
--- ./distinfo	2009-05-07 23:07:22.000000000 +0200
+++ ../echinus/distinfo	2009-05-07 23:07:32.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (echinus-0.3.2.1.tar.gz) = a7670f3455b88295db3dcb21871ae5bf
-SHA256 (echinus-0.3.2.1.tar.gz) =
574f4d20b0991047b87b1e4a557c3f8ac00a643894d0afff51e31a4e79d4b9af
-SIZE (echinus-0.3.2.1.tar.gz) = 26964
+MD5 (echinus-0.3.3.1.tar.gz) = b76128f13666fde4d302ba7111d92334
+SHA256 (echinus-0.3.3.1.tar.gz) =
18917e1097f8efabb78900fc068b2a4178f14cb01dde4b853f58e1097f23761c
+SIZE (echinus-0.3.3.1.tar.gz) = 27403
--- echinus.diff ends here ---
